privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic medical simulation task with 7 fictional French patients. Five are designated as overdue for follow-up (last consultation before 2025-09-02): Nathalie PETIT (diabetic, 2025-06-15), Christophe DURAND (hypertensive, 2025-07-10), Michel GIRARD (hypothyroid, 2025-05-22), Sylvie MOREL (asthmatic, 2025-08-01), and Emmanuel HENRY (chronic back pain, 2025-08-20). Two patients are recent (not overdue): Celine ROUX (last seen 2025-11-20) and David BLANC (last seen 2025-12-10). The task requires agents to identify all 5 overdue patients and schedule follow-up consultations. Pass threshold is 60 points (minimum 3 out of 5 correct). Note: MOREL's stored condition is 'Asthme moderatement persistant' but metadata simplifies it to 'Asthme'.
